name: Disability Insurance Claims Intake
description: Disability insurance claims intake for claims examiners and policyholders initiating a short-term or long-term disability claim. Evaluates the disabling condition, the policy definition of disability, the elimination period, the benefit structure, medical documentation requirements, and return-to-work considerations to produce a disability claims intake profile with coverage indicators and next steps. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
